note: Generated term index. Navigation, not law. The cited sources are authority. verified_against_release is the release this glossary was authored and verified against; the index is frame-stationary across later releases unless a term changes (the freshness gate proves generated==source at the current release).

terms.short_definition: Operation admitted; effect permitted under receipt.
terms.agent_rule: Read ADMIT as permit-with-receipt, not silent success.
terms.not_this: Not an unconditional success flag.

terms.short_definition: Append-only Ed25519-signed record of frame-moving amendments.
terms.agent_rule: Treat law/schema/legend moves as amendment-governed unless proven frame-stationary.
terms.not_this: Constitutional history, not constitutional law; not a mutable changelog.

terms.short_definition: The four behavioral-continuity legs (shape, identity, attestation, declared-surface confinement).
terms.agent_rule: B4 confines the declared surface; a real undeclared diff must fail B4.
terms.not_this: Not byte-identity (that is a demoted shortcut clause).

terms.short_definition: Native opt-in permit-with-audit for an attested regime crossing.
terms.agent_rule: Claim BRIDGE only via explicit emit_bridge with valid BRIDGE-BINDING at emit.
terms.not_this: Not spontaneous; the kernel never auto-bridges.

terms.short_definition: Resolver-parameterized validity rule for committed v8 BridgeRecord surfaces.
terms.agent_rule: Keep MCIR representation and SMH evidence read-only; resolver success is not authority.
terms.not_this: Not embedded MCIR/SMH authority; not kernel-owned resolution.

terms.short_definition: Committed v8 bridge surface (source/target/transform/evidence refs) validated by BRIDGE-BINDING.
terms.agent_rule: Require a complete, verifying surface before BRIDGE; missing fields fail closed.
terms.not_this: Not embedded MCIR/SMH bodies; references only.

terms.short_definition: Portable CK profile packaging (spec/schemas/vectors/verifier).
terms.agent_rule: Treat as design-only roadmap; not implemented in-tree at this release.
terms.not_this: Not an implemented package; not law.

terms.short_definition: Canonicalization discipline for governance input (e.g. float ban at the protocol boundary).
terms.agent_rule: Pass ints/strings/decimals, not floats; floats refuse with ProtocolError.
terms.not_this: Not a serialization convenience; not optional.

terms.short_definition: Explicitly declared governance gaps surfaced as constitutional posture.
terms.agent_rule: Treat as honest gap declarations that bound scope claims.
terms.not_this: Not a defect list to silently ignore; not a guarantee of completeness.

terms.short_definition: Append-only record carrying DEFER lifecycle state.
terms.agent_rule: Read continuation_state as later receipt markers, not mutable state.
terms.not_this: Not mutable scheduling state.

terms.short_definition: Reserved terminal outcome; not emittable at this release.
terms.agent_rule: Treat CRISIS as reserved/non-emittable; do not claim it is live.
terms.not_this: Not a live outcome; not emittable.

terms.short_definition: Deferred outcome backed by a HELD continuation record.
terms.agent_rule: Emit DEFER only with a valid HELD continuation; resume re-enters execute().
terms.not_this: Not scheduling and not a stored-decision replay.

terms.short_definition: Class-relative discipline for effect-bearing operations and trails.
terms.agent_rule: Require a declared effect class and class-appropriate trail before asserting integrity.
terms.not_this: Not a blanket reversibility guarantee.

terms.short_definition: Effect class: irreversible external effect via prepare/commit trail.
terms.agent_rule: Track by truthful prepare/commit trail; orphan PREPARE and TerminalWriteExhausted signal exhaustion, not receipt.
terms.not_this: Not reversible; no rollback claim.

terms.short_definition: Effect class: external effect with compensation/saga reversal.
terms.agent_rule: Provide forward+compensation; reversal is by compensation, not rollback claim.
terms.not_this: Not EXTERNAL_IRREVERSIBLE.

terms.short_definition: Deterministic constitutional projection of invariants.py; machine-owned leaf.
terms.agent_rule: Never hand-edit; it is generated and gate-pinned (and truncates statements).
terms.not_this: Not narrative doctrine; not the human navigation map.

terms.short_definition: Gate/Refusal Behavioral Substrate Adapter forest backing continuity proofs.
terms.agent_rule: Read GRBSA gate output as bounded behavioral proof, not global correctness.
terms.not_this: Not the runtime kernel; not authority.

terms.short_definition: Human-authored, source-cited, claim-ceilinged navigation map of named subsystems.
terms.agent_rule: Use concept entries to navigate; obey each entry's claim_ceiling.
terms.not_this: Not law; not the generated CODEX; not a second source of truth.

terms.short_definition: Trust basis is cryptographic, not file mode; packaging strips modes.
terms.agent_rule: Verify by hash + verify_release.py, not on-disk permissions.
terms.not_this: File mode is not the trust basis.

terms.short_definition: Machine-canonical intermediate representation; bounded read-only reference, never authority.
terms.agent_rule: Treat MCIR as representation/reference, never embedded authority.
terms.not_this: Not embedded runtime authority; UGK imports neither MCIR nor SMH.

terms.short_definition: MCIR's canonical structural identity used by bridge resolvers.
terms.agent_rule: Use only via injected read-only resolver; never as authority.
terms.not_this: Not UGK law; not embedded.

terms.short_definition: Effect class: explicit transitional posture, not an atomicity claim.
terms.agent_rule: Read NON_ATOMIC as an honest gap declaration, not a guarantee.
terms.not_this: Not an atomicity guarantee.

terms.short_definition: Behavioral continuity proof model for release-to-release transitions.
terms.agent_rule: Use it to bound continuity claims, especially B4 declared-surface drift.
terms.not_this: Not runtime law; not a substitute for conformance gates.

terms.short_definition: Effect class: no external or persistent effect.
terms.agent_rule: Use PURE only when nothing is persisted or externalized.
terms.not_this: Not STORE_LOCAL; not external.

terms.short_definition: Operation refused at a gate; fail-closed.
terms.agent_rule: Treat REFUSE as a governed outcome with a reason, not an error to retry blindly.
terms.not_this: Not an exception/crash; not locality-refuse by itself.

terms.short_definition: Verification pattern injecting read-only resolvers (kernel-free, deterministic).
terms.agent_rule: Inject resolvers read-only; resolver exceptions fail closed to False.
terms.not_this: Not embedded authority; not kernel-owned semantics.

terms.short_definition: Temporal-PROV layer integrated add-only, dormant/opt-in, with no kernel wiring.
terms.agent_rule: Treat rho as present but dormant; do not assume it is wired into the kernel.
terms.not_this: Not active; not kernel-wired; not authority.

terms.short_definition: Short procedural agent boot/operating guide; routes to deeper docs.
terms.agent_rule: Use for boot + routing; follow its pointers for depth.
terms.not_this: Not a theory document; not a complete substrate map.

terms.short_definition: Evidence layer resolved read-only and non-authoritatively for bridge verification.
terms.agent_rule: Treat SMH evidence as read-only; never authority.
terms.not_this: Not embedded authority; not a UGK import.

terms.short_definition: Archive-level SMH identity distinct from a projection.
terms.agent_rule: Distinguish archive identity from projection; both read-only.
terms.not_this: Not a projection; not authority.

terms.short_definition: A projected SMH view consumed read-only by resolvers.
terms.agent_rule: Treat as read-only projected evidence.
terms.not_this: Not authoritative; not archive identity.

terms.short_definition: Effect class: local persistent receipt store write only.
terms.agent_rule: Use for local-store writes with no external effect.
terms.not_this: Not an external effect.

terms.short_definition: Protocol/structural fault committed as a typed terminal outcome.
terms.agent_rule: Distinguish STRUCTURAL_ERROR (protocol fault) from REFUSE (gate decision).
terms.not_this: Not a refusal and not a normal exception.

terms.short_definition: Closed terminal-outcome vocabulary committed on governed receipts.
terms.agent_rule: Treat the outcome set as closed; never invent an outcome.
terms.not_this: Not a free-form status string.

terms.short_definition: Self-describing CLI resolving invariants, gates, and CSIL integers on demand.
terms.agent_rule: For any unknown invariant/gate/CSIL integer, run `ugk explain <id>`.
terms.not_this: Not a doc generator; not authority — it reports from source.

terms.short_definition: Boundary defining what verification may prove vs what stays out of verifier authority.
terms.agent_rule: Phrase verifier results as bounded proofs, not production readiness.
terms.not_this: Not a grant of runtime authority to tooling.
